# Talent Management & Succession Planning

Certificate Program

As organizations grapple with uncertainty and complexity, talent practices must adapt. Business leaders are looking to talent management to create and develop a talent pipeline that delivers on profitability, innovation, and competitive advantage. A strategic approach to talent management is crucial to ensure that organizations can access, nurture, and retain the talent they need. This online Talent Management Certificate Program gives you the knowledge and skills to systematically implement talent management strategies that sustain and enable the business into the future.

DOWNLOAD SYLLABUS

ENROLL NOW

What members say about this program:

Packed with practical content and useful templates that could be applied on the job

Helped me communicate more effectively with our company's internal talent team

Builds confidence to engage with Senior Leadership and improving the organizational culture

Trusted by 85,000+ 
HR professionals

## What you will learn

Learn how to proactively manage the talent pipeline to support business continuity

Master methods to identify, develop, and engage tomorrow's leaders

Understand how to use talent data and reports to optimize talent management practices

Earn your certificate with the capstone project by completing a real-world case

### Why AIHR?

✓ Globally accredited & recognized (SHRM, HRCI, more…)

✓ Join 85,000+ members worldwide

✓ Future-focused and human-centric

✓ All the tools you need to level up your career

Read our 12470 reviews

## Program structure

Watch program overview video

36 hours of learning

Strategic Talent Management & Demand Planning

2 modules

• 6 lessons

• 5 hours

Build the foundations of an effective talent management practice

Craft a talent management strategy tailored to business priorities. You’ll learn to develop a talent management framework that creates clarity for the organization, unifies all talent practices, and outlines the implementation of your vision. By the end of this course you’ll be able to define your talent philosophy, and use talent segmenting and demand forecasting to support your workforce planning. Access to tools and guidance support you in creating a talent management strategy for your organization.

Managing the Talent Supply Chain

2 modules

• 5 lessons

• 2 hours

Take a structured and data-driven approach to talent management

Don't leave your talent supply up to chance. This course is designed to teach you about applying the Buy, Build, Borrow and Bot strategies to manage talent supply. You’ll discover a five-step process to match these strategies to the talent demands in your business, build holistic talent profiles and talent data reports, implement the data collection process, and verify and audit the accuracy of sensitive talent data.

Succession Planning

4 modules

• 8 lessons

• 7 hours

Keep critical talent pipelines filled

An effective and proactive approach to succession planning strengthens and future-proofs your talent supply. In this Succession Planning online course, you’ll learn to execute the various steps of a succession planning process, such as talent mapping and talent reviews, building succession pipelines, and segmenting potential leadership talent into different development pools.

Creating an Environment for Talent to Thrive

2 modules

• 6 lessons

• 4 hours

Design a unified talent experience

Attracting, engaging, and developing the right talent is essential for a successful talent management practice. Find out how you can foster an environment that delivers a positive talent experience throughout the entire employee lifecycle, starting with practical tools for creating an employer brand and EVP that support your talent supply strategies. Learn how to deal with the single biggest threat to business continuity: unidentified flight risk, and how to leverage career management and talent mobility to keep your critical talent engaged and on board for the long term.

Organizational Culture

3 modules

Build a strong and healthy organizational culture

Shape a workplace culture that reflects your organization’s vision, mission, and values. In this course, you'll apply the tools and methods to identify different types of cultures and explore the factors that influence culture design. Develop the skills to manage a culture design process and confidently lead culture change initiatives that last.

Capstone Project

Exam + Project

• 2 hours

With the capstone project, you’ll combine theory with practice using your new talent management and succession planning skills in an interactive case study covering five key areas: strategic talent management, talent demand, talent segmentation, talent supply management, and talent management operations. Successfully completing the capstone project not only brings you closer to your certification — it will also give you well-deserved confidence in your new skillset and your ability to use it effectively.

You need to pass the capstone project to earn your certificate!

You can retry the capstone project and exam as often as you like.

All materials needed to complete the project will be provided.

Explore the full curriculum in pdf and **receive email reminders** when enrollment opens

DOWNLOAD SYLLABUS

## FAQs

Need help making the right choice? Speak with an admissions advisor or send them a message.

### Why should I enroll in this Talent Management & Succession Planning Certification Program?

The talent shortage is projected to reach 85 million people by 2030 (KornFerry, The $8.5 Trillion Talent Shortage). Unsurprisingly, 78% of business executives rank talent management as a priority (Zipdo, Essential Talent Management Statistics for 2023).

Yet only 13% of HR leaders consider their talent management practices ‘excellent,’ while 70% of HR leaders rate their organization’s ability to address their talent needs as ‘mediocre,’ according to the same Zipdo article.

Business leaders are looking toward talent management to ensure that organizations can deliver on their strategic intent, show shareholder value, and remain competitive. And this is exactly what you will learn to do in this online Talent Management & Succession Planning certificate program.

### Does this certificate program also cover talent acquisition?

Some of the topics covered in the Talent Management & Succession Planning Certificate Program are also relevant for talent acquisition, such as the Employee Value Proposition and employer branding. However, talent acquisition is not the focus of this program.

AIHR offers a Strategic Talent Acquisition Certificate Program that dives deeper into Talent Acquisition. This can be purchased separately, or you can get access to both programs and more with the Full Academy Access License.

### Do you offer a money-back guarantee for certificate programs?

Yes! We pride ourselves on high-quality programs. That’s why we feel comfortable offering a 30-day money-back guarantee to ensure that you are 100% satisfied. If for any reason it’s not your thing, you can send us an email at [\](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection) to request a full refund.

### Is this program eligible for recertification credits by SHRM, HRCI and others?

The Academy to Innovate HR (AIHR) is a trusted recertification partner of the world’s leading HR Associations, together representing over 1,000,000 HR professionals globally and offers HR programs eligible for recertification credits.

With AIHR, your learning hours count twice — once toward building in-demand HR skills, and again toward maintaining your existing credentials. 

This program is eligible for:

* **26** SHRM PDCs
* **26 HR (General)** Business HRCI Credits
* **25** HRPA PDCs

See the full list of HR associations offering credits for the **Talent Management & Succession Planning Certificate Program**.

Plus, as a registered education provider on LinkedIn, AIHR makes it easy to showcase your new credentials directly on your profile, boosting your professional visibility.

### Is there a fixed schedule?

No. This program is 100% online and self-paced! When you learn and how much time you spend each day, week, or month is up to you. In total, you will need to invest approximately 35 hours to finish the program and obtain your certificate.

### How long do I have access to the program?

In total, you will have 12 months of access to the student portal, all lessons, and learning materials. On average, members complete their (first) program in 3 - 4 months.

### Which languages are the courses conducted in?

All courses are conducted in English with English subtitles available.

### Is this program the right fit for me?

If you’re not sure if this program is the right fit, we are here to help you determine which program is the right fit for your goals and needs! Simply talk to one of our admissions advisors or send them an email at [\](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection).

### Do I need any software tools to complete this program?

No special software tools are required to complete this program. All materials needed are provided in the training platform.

5.0Rachel Steyn from Johannesburg,South Africa

This was a great certification program that covered talent management and succession planinng from end to end. I think it equips practitioners well with practical tools to implement in their organisations.

Posted 1 day ago

5.0Meshref Alshammary from Riyadh,Saudi Arabia

The Talent Management & Succession Planning Certificate Program is a practical and well-structured learning experience for HR professionals who want to strengthen their ability to align talent practices with business strategy. The program provides useful frameworks for talent segmentation, demand planning, succession planning, leadership development, employee retention, and career mobility. One of its strengths is the use of realistic case studies which helps learners apply concepts instead of only memorizing theory. The activities encourage critical thinking about talent gaps, flight risk, employer branding, and leadership pipelines. Overall, the program is valuable for building a more strategic approach to talent management and preparing organizations for future workforce needs.

Posted 4 days ago

5.0Mohamed Abdelaziz from Karbala,Iraq

This program delivers a practical, case-based learning experience that bridges strategic HR theory with real-world organizational challenges. Through the narrative of RetroTech Solutions — a scale-up tech company facing talent crises — learners engage with authentic scenarios spanning talent acquisition, segmentation, succession planning, performance management, and organizational culture.

Posted 5 days ago
